chosen_action.title: After Your First Ralph Workflow Run, Put the Signal on Codeberg

shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg and GitHub adoption flat in recent window
NON_REDDIT_CHANNELS_NEXT.md: owned content is the strongest immediately actionable path
why_this_action.reasoning: Top-of-funnel Telegraph explainers already existed, but the current bottleneck is conversion into public Codeberg signals. A post aimed at the moment right after a real first run is a closer move: it pushes qualified evaluators toward star/watch/issue actions on Codeberg instead of another abstract awareness piece.
